title: Module 6: Advanced DOM
description: Browser ki memory aur advanced events.

chapters.title: 1. Event Bubbling
chapters.content: Jab aap kisi element par click karte hain, to wo click uske parent par bhi jaata hai. Ise Bubbling kehte hain.

chapters.title: 2. Local Storage
chapters.content:
Browser ke paas ek chhota sa database hota hai. Page refresh hone par bhi data save rehta hai.

  • localStorage.setItem('key', 'value')
  • localStorage.getItem('key')

chapters.title: 3. JSON
chapters.content:
Data ko text me badalne ke liye JSON use hota hai.

  • JSON.stringify(): Object -> Text
  • JSON.parse(): Text -> Object
